lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਧਾਰਹੁ ਹਰਿ ਧਾਰਹੁ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਲੇਹੁ ਉਬਾਰੇ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: har dhaarahu har dhaarahu kirapaa kar kirapaa lehu ubaare raam |
lines.english: Grant Your Grace, grant Your Grace, O Lord, and save me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਮ ਪਾਪੀ ਹਮ ਪਾਪੀ ਨਿਰਗੁਣ ਦੀਨ ਤੁਮੑਾਰੇ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: ham paapee ham paapee niragun deen tumaare raam |
lines.english: I am a sinner, I am a worthless sinner, I am meek, but I am Yours, O Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂ ਦੁਖ ਭੰਜਨੁ ਸਰਬ ਸੁਖਦਾਤਾ ਹਮ ਪਾਥਰ ਤਰੇ ਤਰਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: too dukh bhanjan sarab sukhadaataa ham paathar tare taraaeaa |
lines.english: You are the Destroyer of pain, the Giver of absolute peace; I am a stone - carry me across and save me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਮ ਪਾਪੀ ਨਿਰਗੁਣ ਦੀਨ ਤੁਮੑਾਰੇ ਹਰਿ ਦੈਆਲ ਸਰਣਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: ham paapee niragun deen tumaare har daiaal saranaaeaa |
lines.english: I am a worthless sinner, and I am meek, but I am Yours; I seek Your Sanctuary, O Merciful Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਭੇਟਿ ਰਾਮ ਰਸੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮਿ ਉਧਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: satigur bhett raam ras paaeaa jan naanak naam udhaare |
lines.english: Meeting the True Guru, servant Nanak has obtained the subtle essence of the Lord; through the Naam, the Name of the Lord, he is saved.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਧਾਰਹੁ ਹਰਿ ਧਾਰਹੁ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਲੇਹੁ ਉਬਾਰੇ ਰਾਮ ॥੪॥੪॥
lines.translit: har dhaarahu har dhaarahu kirapaa kar kirapaa lehu ubaare raam |4|4|
lines.english: Grant Your Grace, grant Your Grace, Lord, and save me. ||4||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਡਹੰਸੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੪ ਘੋੜੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: vaddahans mahalaa 4 ghorreea |
lines.english: Wadahans, Fourth Mehl, Ghorees ~ The Wedding Procession Songs:

lines.gurmukhi: ਧੰਨੁ ਮਾਣਸ ਜਨਮੁ ਪੁੰਨਿ ਪਾਈਆ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: dhan maanas janam pun paaeea raam |
lines.english: Blessed is human life, which is obtained by virtuous actions.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਣਸ ਜਨਮੁ ਵਡ ਪੁੰਨੇ ਪਾਇਆ ਦੇਹ ਸੁ ਕੰਚਨ ਚੰਗੜੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: maanas janam vadd pune paaeaa deh su kanchan changarreea |
lines.english: Human life is obtained only by the most virtuous actions; this body is radiant and golden.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੇਹ ਤੇਜਣਿ ਜੀ ਰਾਮਿ ਉਪਾਈਆ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: deh tejan jee raam upaaeea raam |
lines.english: This body-horse was created by the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਰੰਗੁ ਚਲੂਲਾ ਪਾਵੈ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਵ ਰੰਗੜੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh rang chaloolaa paavai har har har nav rangarreea |
lines.english: The Gurmukh is imbued with the deep red color of the poppy; he is imbued with the new color of the Lord's Name, Har, Har, Har.

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਹ ਦੇਹ ਸੁ ਬਾਂਕੀ ਜਿਤੁ ਹਰਿ ਜਾਪੀ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮਿ ਸੁਹਾਵੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: eeh deh su baankee jit har jaapee har har naam suhaaveea |
lines.english: This body is so very beautiful; it chants the Name of the Lord, and it is adorned with the Name of the Lord, Har, Har.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਡਭਾਗੀ ਪਾਈ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਖਾਈ ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਰਾਮਿ ਉਪਾਈਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: vaddabhaagee paaee naam sakhaaee jan naanak raam upaaeea |1|
lines.english: By great good fortune, the body is obtained; the Naam, the Name of the Lord, is its companion; O servant Nanak, the Lord has created it. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੇਹ ਪਾਵਉ ਜੀਨੁ ਬੁਝਿ ਚੰਗਾ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: deh paavau jeen bujh changaa raam |
lines.english: I place the saddle on the body-horse, the saddle of realization of the Good Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਖਮੁ ਭੁਇਅੰਗਾ ਅਨਤ ਤਰੰਗਾ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਪਾਰਿ ਲੰਘਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: bikham bhueiangaa anat tarangaa guramukh paar langhaae |
lines.english: The terrifying world-ocean is rocked by countless waves, but the Gurmukh is carried across.

lines.gurmukhi: ਚੜਿ ਲੰਘਾ ਜੀ ਬਿਖਮੁ ਭੁਇਅੰਗਾ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: charr langhaa jee bikham bhueiangaa raam |
lines.english: Riding this horse, I cross over the terrifying world-ocean.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਬੋਹਿਥਿ ਚੜਿ ਵਡਭਾਗੀ ਲੰਘੈ ਗੁਰੁ ਖੇਵਟੁ ਸਬਦਿ ਤਰਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: har bohith charr vaddabhaagee langhai gur khevatt sabad taraae |
lines.english: Embarking upon the boat of the Lord, the very fortunate ones cross over; the Guru, the Boatman, carries them across through the Word of the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਰੰਗਿ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵੈ ਹਰਿ ਰੰਗੀ ਹਰਿ ਰੰਗਾ ॥
lines.translit: anadin har rang har gun gaavai har rangee har rangaa |
lines.english: Night and day, imbued with the Lord's Love, singing the Glorious Praises of the Lord, the Lord's lover loves the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਨਿਰਬਾਣ ਪਦੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਹਰਿ ਉਤਮੁ ਹਰਿ ਪਦੁ ਚੰਗਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jan naanak nirabaan pad paaeaa har utam har pad changaa |2|
lines.english: Servant Nanak has obtained the state of Nirvaanaa, the state of ultimate goodness, the state of the Lord. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਨਿ ਪ੍ਰੇਮੁ ਹਰਿ ਚਾਬਕੁ ਲਾਇਆ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: tan prem har chaabak laaeaa raam |
lines.english: He has applied the whip of the Lord's Love to my body.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੜੀਆਲੁ ਮੁਖੇ ਗੁਰਿ ਗਿਆਨੁ ਦ੍ਰਿੜਾਇਆ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: karreeaal mukhe gur giaan drirraaeaa raam |
lines.english: For a bridle in my mouth, the Guru has implanted spiritual wisdom within me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਨਿ ਪ੍ਰੇਮੁ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਲਾਇ ਚਾਬਕੁ ਮਨੁ ਜਿਣੈ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਜੀਤਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: tan prem har har laae chaabak man jinai guramukh jeetiaa |
lines.english: Applying the whip of the Lord's Love to his body, the Gurmukh conquers his mind, and wins the battle of life.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਘੜੋ ਘੜਾਵੈ ਸਬਦੁ ਪਾਵੈ ਅਪਿਉ ਹਰਿ ਰਸੁ ਪੀਤਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: agharro gharraavai sabad paavai apiau har ras peetiaa |
lines.english: He trains his untrained mind with the Word of the Shabad, and drinks in the rejuvenating essence of the Lord's Nectar.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਣਿ ਸ੍ਰਵਣ ਬਾਣੀ ਗੁਰਿ ਵਖਾਣੀ ਹਰਿ ਰੰਗੁ ਤੁਰੀ ਚੜਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: sun sravan baanee gur vakhaanee har rang turee charraaeaa |
lines.english: Listen with your ears to the Word, uttered by the Guru, and attune your body-horse to the Lord's Love.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਹਾ ਮਾਰਗੁ ਪੰਥੁ ਬਿਖੜਾ ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਪਾਰਿ ਲੰਘਾਇਆ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: mahaa maarag panth bikharraa jan naanak paar langhaaeaa |3|
lines.english: Servant Nanak has crossed over the long and treacherous path. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਘੋੜੀ ਤੇਜਣਿ ਦੇਹ ਰਾਮਿ ਉਪਾਈਆ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: ghorree tejan deh raam upaaeea raam |
lines.english: The transitory body-horse was created by the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਤੁ ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਜਾਪੈ ਸਾ ਧਨੁ ਧੰਨੁ ਤੁਖਾਈਆ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: jit har prabh jaapai saa dhan dhan tukhaaeea raam |
lines.english: Blessed, blessed is that body-horse which meditates on the Lord God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਤੁ ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਜਾਪੈ ਸਾ ਧੰਨੁ ਸਾਬਾਸੈ ਧੁਰਿ ਪਾਇਆ ਕਿਰਤੁ ਜੁੜੰਦਾ ॥
lines.translit: jit har prabh jaapai saa dhan saabaasai dhur paaeaa kirat jurrandaa |
lines.english: Blessed and acclaimed is that body-horse which meditates on the Lord God; it is obtained by the merits of past actions.

lines.gurmukhi: ਚੜਿ ਦੇਹੜਿ ਘੋੜੀ ਬਿਖਮੁ ਲਘਾਏ ਮਿਲੁ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਪਰਮਾਨੰਦਾ ॥
lines.translit: charr deharr ghorree bikham laghaae mil guramukh paramaanandaa |
lines.english: Riding the body-horse, one crosses over the terrifying world ocean; the Gurmukh meets the Lord, the embodiment of supreme bliss.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਕਾਜੁ ਰਚਾਇਆ ਪੂਰੈ ਮਿਲਿ ਸੰਤ ਜਨਾ ਜੰਞ ਆਈ ॥
lines.translit: har har kaaj rachaaeaa poorai mil sant janaa jany aaee |
lines.english: The Lord, Har, Har, has perfectly arranged this wedding; the Saints have come together as a marriage party.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਹਰਿ ਵਰੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਮੰਗਲੁ ਮਿਲਿ ਸੰਤ ਜਨਾ ਵਾਧਾਈ ॥੪॥੧॥੫॥
lines.translit: jan naanak har var paaeaa mangal mil sant janaa vaadhaaee |4|1|5|
lines.english: Servant Nanak has obtained the Lord as his Spouse; joining together, the Saints sing the songs of joy and congratulations. ||4||1||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੇਹ ਤੇਜਨੜੀ ਹਰਿ ਨਵ ਰੰਗੀਆ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: deh tejanarree har nav rangeea raam |
lines.english: The body is the Lord's horse; the Lord imbues it with the fresh and new color.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਗਿਆਨੁ ਗੁਰੂ ਹਰਿ ਮੰਗੀਆ ਰਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: gur giaan guroo har mangeea raam |
lines.english: From the Guru, I ask for the Lord's spiritual wisdom.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਡਹੰਸੁ ਮਹਲਾ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: vaddahans mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Wadahans, Fourth Mehl:
